member.name: T:OWSCharacterPersistence.Controllers.SystemController
member.remarks: Contains system related API calls that are all publicly accessible.

member.name: M:OWSCharacterPersistence.Controllers.SystemController.Status
member.remarks: Get the Api Status and return true

member.name: T:OWSCharacterPersistence.Requests.Characters.GetCustomDataRequest
member.remarks: Get a list of all Custom Data fields for this character with their Field Values. Characters can have zero or more Custom Data fields.

member.name: P:OWSCharacterPersistence.Requests.Characters.GetCustomDataRequest.CharacterName
member.remarks: This is the name of the character to get Custom Data fields for.

member.name: M:OWSCharacterPersistence.Requests.Characters.GetQuestsFromDatabaseRequest.SetData(OWSData.Repositories.Interfaces.ICharactersRepository,OWSShared.Interfaces.IHeaderCustomerGUID)
member.remarks: Injects the dependencies for the GetByNameRequest.
